description: Style Note Flattering your figure while keeping you airy and comfortable, this only tank top is a must have casual top. The broad lace detailing at the bottom gives it a feminine touch. You can wear it with a light coloured pair of pants or capris and a comfortable pair of flip flops to get set for a casual day out. Product Details Red sleeveless top with a scooped neck and black lace detailing at the bottom Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% elastane Machine wash cold at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
